scripts.release:verify:node: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:tests && pnpm test && pnpm schema:gen && git diff --exit-code packages/schema/generated && test -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard packages/schema/generated)" && node scripts/validate-generated-schemas.mjs && pnpm docs:check && node scripts/concept-gate.mjs --since-last-tag && pnpm staged:check && pnpm knip && node scripts/complexity-ratchet.mjs && node scripts/model-hints-freshness.mjs --strict && pnpm canary
scripts.release:verify:swift: (cd apps/macos/ClaudexorKit && PATH="$HOME/.swiftly/bin:$PATH" swift test) && (cd apps/macos/ClaudexorApp && PATH="$HOME/.swiftly/bin:$PATH" swift build)
scripts.release:verify: pnpm release:verify:node && pnpm release:verify:swift && pnpm release:verify:app
